title: Media Widely Covers Upcoming Spotify Concert Film Premiere; Drake-Bad Bunny Origin Story Resurfaces
detail: Multiple outlets including National Today/LA Today and HotNewHipHop run preview coverage ahead of the April 8 Spotify premiere of the Billions Club Live concert film. Separately, an account from a Miami nightclub owner about how he introduced Bad Bunny and Drake at a dinner in 2018, leading to their "MIA" collaboration, circulates widely on April 7-8 across iHeart stations ahead of the businessman's book launch on April 14. The story underscores how foundational the Bad Bunny–Drake crossover was for expanding reggaetón's reach in North America.

sources.name: National Today / Los Angeles Today — Bad Bunny Japan Concert to Stream on Spotify
